languages.text: Реактор Чудотворного Синтеза был передан Вольным Торговцем в благословенную обитель Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17. Техносхимники окружили археотечную машину великим почетом и неустанной заботой, обращая наполняющую ее мощь Движущей Силы во благо служения Богу-Машине. Присутствие Реактора благотворно сказалось на развитии станции, и спустя несколько лет та превратилась в процветающий оплот Культа Механикус.

traits.locale_text: Реактор Чудотворного Синтеза был передан Вольным Торговцем в благословенную обитель Алтарь-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17. Техносхимники окружили археотечную машину великим почетом и неустанной заботой, обращая наполняющую ее мощь Движущей Силы во благо служения Богу-Машине. Присутствие Реактора благотворно сказалось на развитии станции, и спустя несколько лет та превратилась в процветающий оплот Культа Механикус.

languages.text: The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.

traits.locale_text: The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.

The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.

languages.text: El Reactor de Fusión Milagroso fue entregado a la bendita morada de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Los tecnoascetas trataron el artefacto de arqueotecnología con sumo cuidado y trabajo incansable, destinando la Fuerza Motriz que lo llenaba al servicio del Dios Máquina. La presencia del reactor contribuyó al desarrollo de la estación, que en pocos años se convirtió en un bastión próspero del Culto Mechanicus.
languages.original_text: The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.

traits.locale_text: El Reactor de Fusión Milagroso fue entregado a la bendita morada de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Los tecnoascetas trataron el artefacto de arqueotecnología con sumo cuidado y trabajo incansable, destinando la Fuerza Motriz que lo llenaba al servicio del Dios Máquina. La presencia del reactor contribuyó al desarrollo de la estación, que en pocos años se convirtió en un bastión próspero del Culto Mechanicus.

languages.text: 神赐聚变反应堆已被行商浪人移交至神圣的卡利西斯祭坛17号。技术苦修者们以无上的敬意和不懈的侍奉，精心照料着这台远古科技机器，将充盈其中的强大源力转而用于侍奉万机之神。反应堆的存在对该星站的发展产生了积极影响，数年后，这里便成了一座繁荣兴盛的机械修会堡垒。
languages.original_text: The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.

traits.locale_text: 神赐聚变反应堆已被行商浪人移交至神圣的卡利西斯祭坛17号。技术苦修者们以无上的敬意和不懈的侍奉，精心照料着这台远古科技机器，将充盈其中的强大源力转而用于侍奉万机之神。反应堆的存在对该星站的发展产生了积极影响，数年后，这里便成了一座繁荣兴盛的机械修会堡垒。

languages.text: Le réacteur à fusion miraculeux fut remis par {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} au lieu saint d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Les techno-ascètes y prodiguèrent d'innombrables attentions à la machine archéotechnologique avec la plus grande révérence, mettant toute la puissance de la Force motrice au service du Dieu-Machine. La présence du réacteur eut des effets bénéfiques sur le développement de la station, qui devint, en l'espace de quelques années seulement, un bastion florissant du Culte Mechanicus.
languages.original_text: The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.

languages.text: Mucizevi Füzyon Reaktörü, Hür Tacir tarafından Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin kutsanmış meskenine teslim edildi. Tekno çileciler, arkeotek makinesine büyük bir hürmet ve yorulmak bilmeyen hizmetlerle özen göstererek içini dolduran Devinim Gücü'nün kudretini Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetine sundular. Reaktörün varlığı, birkaç yıl içinde Cult Mechanicus'un gelişen bir kalesi hâline gelen istasyonun gelişimine olumlu etkide bulundu.
languages.original_text: The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.

traits.locale_text: Mucizevi Füzyon Reaktörü, Hür Tacir tarafından Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin kutsanmış meskenine teslim edildi. Tekno çileciler, arkeotek makinesine büyük bir hürmet ve yorulmak bilmeyen hizmetlerle özen göstererek içini dolduran Devinim Gücü'nün kudretini Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetine sundular. Reaktörün varlığı, birkaç yıl içinde Cult Mechanicus'un gelişen bir kalesi hâline gelen istasyonun gelişimine olumlu etkide bulundu.

languages.text: 奇跡の融合炉は、悪行商人によってアルタール・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17の聖なる地に届けられた。テクノ・アスケティクスは、このアーケオテクノロジーの機械を崇敬の念を持って、疲れを知らずに世話をして、その中に充填された動機力の力を機械神に捧げた。この炉の存在は、このステーションの発展に良い影響を与え、数年後には機械神教の繁栄する要塞となった。
languages.original_text: The Miraculous Fusion Reactor was handed over by the Rogue Trader to the blessed abode of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. The tech-ascetics lavished the archeotech machine with great reverence and tireless ministrations, turning the might of the Motive Force that filled it to the service of the Machine God. The Reactor's presence had a beneficial effect on the development of the station, which went on to become a thriving bastion of the Cult Mechanicus within several years.

traits.locale_text: 奇跡の融合炉は、悪行商人によってアルタール・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17の聖なる地に届けられた。テクノ・アスケティクスは、このアーケオテクノロジーの機械を崇敬の念を持って、疲れを知らずに世話をして、その中に充填された動機力の力を機械神に捧げた。この炉の存在は、このステーションの発展に良い影響を与え、数年後には機械神教の繁栄する要塞となった。

languages.text: Der wundersame Fusionsreaktor wurde {mf|vom Freihändler|von der Freihändlerin} der gesegneten Bleibe von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 übergeben. Die Tech-Asketen begegneten der Archäotech mit großer Ehrerbietung und unermüdlicher Fürsorge und stellten die Macht der Antriebskraft, die sie erfüllte, in den Dienst des Maschinengottes. Die Gegenwart des Reaktors hatte vorteilhafte Auswirkungen auf die Entwicklung der Station, die in wenigen Jahren eine pulsierende Bastion des Kult Mechanicus wurde.
